title: fragment.rs: Ack::from_bytes silently treats missing bitmap bytes as zeros
notes: Fix implemented: length validation added before bitmap parsing in Ack::from_bytes (rust/lichen-schc/src/fragment.rs:232). TooShort error returned for truncated ACKs instead of silent zero-fill. Roundtrip tests pass. Commit pending due to merge conflict in workspace.
close_reason: Implemented length validation in Ack::from_bytes to error on truncated bitmap instead of silent zeroing (matches suggested fix). Verified in rust/lichen-schc/src/fragment.rs:232-241. Tests in ack_round_trip pass. Workspace has unrelated merge conflicts.
